tool.name: Filter empty datasets

param.name: replacement
param.label: Replace empty elements with this dataset
param.help: If provided, empty elements will be replaced with this dataset

tool.help:
======== Synopsis ========
Removes empty datasets from a collection.
=========== Description ===========
This tool takes a dataset collection and filters out (removes) datasets that have no content (zero bytes). This is useful for continuing a multi-sample analysis when downstream tools require datasets to have content.
Optionally, you can provide a replacement dataset. When a replacement is specified, empty elements are replaced with that dataset instead of being removed.
.. image:: ${static_path}/images/tools/collection_ops/filter_empty.svg :alt: Filtering empty datasets :width: 500
-----
.. class:: infomark
@QUOTA_USAGE_NOTE@
